verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ቤሴሌእል ፡ ወኤሊያብ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ጠቢበ ፡ ልብ ፡ እለ ፡ ተውህበ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ጥበብ ፡ ወአእምሮ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ይግበሩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ዘይትፈቀድ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአዘዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And Beseleel wrought, and Eliab and every one wise in understanding, to whom was given wisdom and knowledge, to understand to do all the works according to the holy offices, according to all things which the Lord appointed.
translations.kjv: Then wrought Bezaleel and Aholiab, and every wise hearted man, in whom the LORD put wisdom and understanding to know how to work all manner of work for the service of the sanctuary, according to all that the LORD had commanded.

verses.geez:
ወጸውዖሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለቤሴሌእል ፡ ወለኤሊያብ ፡ ወለኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ቦሙ ፡ ጥበበ ፡ እለ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  አእምሮ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልቦሙ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እለ ፡ በፈቃደ ፡ ልቦሙ ፡ ይገብሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሑሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ግብር ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ይፈጽምዎ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses called Beseleel and Eliab, and all that had wisdom, to whom God gave knowledge in their heart, and all who were freely willing to come forward to the works, to perform them.
translations.kjv: And Moses called Bezaleel and Aholiab, and every wise hearted man, in whose heart the LORD had put wisdom, even every one whose heart stirred him up to come unto the work to do it:

verses.geez:
ወነሥ[ኡ] ፡ በኀበ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ መባአ ፡ ዘአብኡ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ምግባረ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይግበሩ ፡
                  ወእሙንቱ ፡ ይትወከፉ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ዘያበውኡ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ እለ ፡ ያመጽኡ ፡ ነግሀ ፡ ነግህ ።

translations.lxx: And they received from Moses all the offerings, which the children of Israel brought for all the works of the sanctuary to do them; and they continued to receive the gifts brought, from those who brought them in the morning.
translations.kjv: And they received of Moses all the offering, which the children of Israel had brought for the work of the service of the sanctuary, to make it withal. And they brought yet unto him free offerings every morning.

verses.geez: ወመጺኦሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ጠቢባን ፡ እለ ፡ ይገብሩ ፡ ግብረ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ በበ ፡ ምግባሪሁ ፡ ዘይገብር ፤

translations.lxx: And there came all the wise men who wrought the works of the sanctuary, each according to his own work, which they wrought.
translations.kjv: And all the wise men, that wrought all the work of the sanctuary, came every man from his work which they made;

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ብዙኅ ፡ መባእ ፡ ያበውእ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እምግብር ፡ ዘአዘዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትገበር ።

translations.lxx: And one said to Moses, The people bring an abundance too great in proportion to all the works which the Lord has appointed them to do.
translations.kjv: And they spake unto Moses, saying, The people bring much more than enough for the service of the work, which the LORD commanded to make.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዘ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወሰበከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ለዕድኒ ፡ ወለአንስትኒ ፡ እምይእዜ ፡ ኢይግበሩ ፡ መባአ ፡ ዘዐሥራት ፡
                  ዘመቅደስ ፡ ወተከልአ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ እንከ ፡ አብኦ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses commanded, and proclaimed in the camp, saying, Let neither man nor woman any longer labour for the offerings of the sanctuary; and the people were restrained from bringing any more.
translations.kjv: And Moses gave commandment, and they caused it to be proclaimed throughout the camp, saying, Let neither man nor woman make any more work for the offering of the sanctuary. So the people were restrained from bringing.

verses.geez: እስመ ፡ አከሎሙ ፡ ለምግባረ ፡ ይገብሩ ፡ ወተርፎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they had materials sufficient for making the furniture, and they left some besides.
translations.kjv: For the stuff they had was sufficient for all the work to make it, and too much.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ጠቢባን ፡ እለ ፡ ይገብሩ ፡ አልባሲሆሙ ፡ ለቅዱሳን ፡ ዘይከውኖ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ለካህን ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ
                  ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And every wise one among those that wrought made the robes of the holy places, which belong to Aaron the priest, as the Lord commanded Moses.
translations.kjv: And every wise hearted man among them that wrought the work of the tabernacle made ten curtains of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet: with cherubims of cunning work made he them.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ዘላዕለ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ዘደረከኖ ፡ ወሕብረ ፡ ከብድ ፡ ወለይ ፡ ፍቱል ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ክዑብ ።

translations.lxx: And he made the ephod of gold, and blue, and purple, and spun scarlet, and fine linen twined.
translations.kjv: The length of one curtain was twenty and eight cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: the curtains were all of one size.

verses.geez:
ወሰጠቅዎ ፡ ለቈጽለ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ወገብርዎ ፡ አፍታለ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትፈተል ፡ ምስለ ፡ ደረከኖ ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ከብድ
                  ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ለይ ፡ ፍቱል ፡ ወምስለ ፡ ሜላት ፡ ክዑብ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ።

translations.lxx: And the plates were divided, the threads of gold, so as to interweave with the blue and purple, and with the spun scarlet, and the fine linen twined, they made it a woven work;
translations.kjv: And he coupled the five curtains one unto another: and the other five curtains he coupled one unto another.

verses.geez: ወገብርዎ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ ዘይወርድ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆን ፡ መታክፊሁ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ዘበበይኑ ፡ ፅፉር ፤

translations.lxx: shoulder-pieces joined from both sides, a work woven by mutual twisting of the parts into one another.
translations.kjv: And he made loops of blue on the edge of one curtain from the selvedge in the coupling: likewise he made in the uttermost side of another curtain, in the coupling of the second.

verses.geez:
ወእንተ ፡ ባሕቲትሁ ፡ ገብርዎ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ በከመ ፡ ግብረቱ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ወያክንት ፡ ወበሕብረ ፡ ከብድ ፡ ወበለይ ፡
                  ፍቱል ፡ ወበሜላት ፡ ክዑብ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: They made it of the same material according to the making of it, of gold, and blue, and purple, and spun scarlet, and fine linen twined, as the Lord commanded Moses;
translations.kjv: Fifty loops made he in one curtain, and fifty loops made he in the edge of the curtain which was in the coupling of the second: the loops held one curtain to another.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ እብነ ፡ ዘመረግድ ፡ ወአውደድዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ወግሉፍ ፡ ከመ ፡ ግልፈተ ፡ ማኅተም ፡
                  በአስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: and they made the two emerald stones clasped together and set in gold, graven and cut after the cutting of a seal with the names of the children of Israel;
translations.kjv: And he made fifty taches of gold, and coupled the curtains one unto another with the taches: so it became one tabernacle.

verses.geez:
ወወደይዎ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ መታክፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ ዕንቈ ፡ ዘተዝካሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በከመ ፡
                  አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: and he put them on the shoulder-pieces of the ephod, as stones of memorial of the children of Israel, as the Lord appointed Moses.
translations.kjv: And he made curtains of goats’ hair for the tent over the tabernacle: eleven curtains he made them.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ሎግዮን ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ዕሡቀ ፡ ከመ ፡ ግብረተ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ በወርቅ ፡ ወበያክንት
                  ፡ ወበሕብረ ፡ ከብድ ፡ ወለይ ፡ ፍቱል ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ክዑብ ።

translations.lxx: And they made the oracle, a work woven with embroidery, according to the work of the ephod, of gold, and blue, and purple, and spun scarlet, and fine linen twined.
translations.kjv: The length of one curtain was thirty cubits, and four cubits was the breadth of one curtain: the eleven curtains were of one size.

verses.geez: ርቡዕ ፡ ወውጡሕ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ሎግዮን ፡ ባዕ ፡ አውዱ ፡ ወባዕ ፡ ወርዱ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ውጡሕ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: They made the oracle square and double, the length of a span, and the breadth of a span,—double.
translations.kjv: And he coupled five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves.

verses.geez:
ወተአንመ ፡ ውስቴቱ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ ጾታ ፡ እንመተ ፡ ዘበዕንቍ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ጾታ ፡ ዘበዕንቍ ፡ በሶም ፡ [ወ]ወራውሬ ፡
                  ወዘመረግድ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ዘአሐዱ ፡ ጾታ ።

translations.lxx: And there was interwoven with it a woven work of four rows of stones, a series of stones, the first row, a sardius and topaz and emerald;
translations.kjv: And he made fifty loops upon the uttermost edge of the curtain in the coupling, and fifty loops made he upon the edge of the curtain which coupleth the second.

verses.geez: ወዘካልእ ፡ ጾታ ፡ በቀይሕ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ወበጸሊም ፡ ያክንት ፡ ወበጥልም ።

translations.lxx: and the second row, a carbuncle and sapphire and jasper;
translations.kjv: And he made fifty taches of brass to couple the tent together, that it might be one.

verses.geez: ወሣልስ ፡ ጾታ ፡ በሊጊር ፡ ወአካጤ ፡ ወከርከዴን ።

translations.lxx: and the third row, a ligure and agate and amethyst;
translations.kjv: And he made a covering for the tent of rams’ skins dyed red, and a covering of badgers’ skins above that.

verses.geez: ወራብዕ ፡ ጾታ ፡ በዕንቍ ፡ ዘሕብረ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ወበብረሌ ፡ ወኦኒክዮን ፤ ወዕውድ ፡ በወርቅ ፡ ወእሱር ፡ በወርቅ ።

translations.lxx: and the fourth row a chrysolite and beryl and onyx set round about with gold, and fastened with gold.
translations.kjv: And he made boards for the tabernacle of shittim wood, standing up.

verses.geez:
ወውእቱ ፡ ዕንቍ ፡ በአስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ በበአስማቲሆሙ ፡ ወግሉፋት ፡ ከመ ፡ ግልፈተ
                  ፡ ማኅተም ፡ ለለአሐዱ ፡ በበስሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፲ወ፪አንጋድ ።

translations.lxx: And the stones were twelve according to the names of the children of Israel, graven according to their names like seals, each according to his own name for the twelve tribes.
translations.kjv: The length of a board was ten cubits, and the breadth of a board one cubit and a half.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ዘፈረ ፡ ዘልብሰ ፡ ሎግዮን ፡ ፅፉ[ረ] ፡ ግብረተ ፡ ፍትሎ ፡ ወወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ።

translations.lxx: And they made on the oracle turned wreaths, wreathen work, of pure gold,
translations.kjv: One board had two tenons, equally distant one from another: thus did he make for all the boards of the tabernacle.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ከባበ ፡ ጥውዮ ፡ ወክልኤ ፡ ሕለቃተ ፡ ወርቅ ።

translations.lxx: and they made two golden circlets and two golden rings. And they put the two golden rings on both the upper corners of the oracle;
translations.kjv: And he made boards for the tabernacle; twenty boards for the south side southward:

verses.geez: ወወደይዎ ፡ ለውእቶን ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ሕለቃተ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ ጽነፊሁ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሎግዮን ።

translations.lxx: and they put the golden wreaths on the rings on both sides of the oracle,
translations.kjv: And forty sockets of silver he made under the twenty boards; two sockets under one board for his two tenons, and two sockets under another board for his two tenons.

verses.geez:
ወወደይዎ ፡ ለዝክቱ ፡ ፅፍሮ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ሕለቃት ፡ እምክልኤሆሙ ፡ ገበዋቱ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡
                  ሎግዮን ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ ማኅበርቱ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ፅፍሮ ።

translations.lxx: and the two wreaths into the two couplings. And they put them on the two circlets, and they put them on the shoulders of the ephod opposite each other in front.
translations.kjv: And for the other side of the tabernacle, which is toward the north corner, he made twenty boards,

verses.geez:
ወአንበርዎ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ከባበ ፡ ጥውዮ ፡ ወወደይዎ ፡ መንገለ ፡ መታክፉ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡
                  አንጻረ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጹ ።

translations.lxx: And they made two golden rings, and put them on the two projections on the top of the oracle, and on the top of the hinder part of the ephod within.
translations.kjv: And their forty sockets of silver; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ሕለቃተ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፤

translations.lxx: And they made two golden rings, and put them on both the shoulders of the ephod under it, in front by the coupling above the connexion of the ephod.
translations.kjv: And for the sides of the tabernacle westward he made six boards.

verses.geez:
ወአንበርዎ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ክልኤሆን ፡ መታክፉ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ እምታሕቱ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ገጹ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ማኅበርቱ ፡
                  መልዕልተ ፡ እንመቱ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ።

translations.lxx: And he fastened the oracle by the rings that were on it to the rings of the ephod, which were fastened with a string of blue, joined together with the woven work of the ephod; that the oracle should not be loosed from the ephod, as the Lord commanded Moses.
translations.kjv: And two boards made he for the corners of the tabernacle in the two sides.

verses.geez:
ወአስተአኀዞ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሎግዮን ፡ በሕለቃት ፡ ዘላዕሌሁ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕለቃት ፡ ዘልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ ወእኁዛን ፡
                  በያክንቶሙ ፡ ወፅፉራን ፡ በእንመት ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይንጦልል ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ሎግዮን ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ልብሰ ፡
                  መትከፍት ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And they made the tunic under the ephod, woven work, all of blue.
translations.kjv: And they were coupled beneath, and coupled together at the head thereof, to one ring: thus he did to both of them in both the corners.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ ዘስሙ ፡ ሂጶዲጤን ፡ መትሕተ ፡ ልብሰ ፡ መትከፍት ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ዘኵሉ ፡ በደረከኖ ፤

translations.lxx: And the opening of the tunic in the midst woven closely together, the opening having a fringe round about, that it might not be rent.
translations.kjv: And there were eight boards; and their sockets were sixteen sockets of silver, under every board two sockets.

verses.geez: ወፋእሙ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሂጶዲጤን ፡ በመንገለ ፡ ማእከሉ ፡ እኑ[ም] ፡ በፅፍሮ ፡ ወበዐይን ፡ ዘዖዶ ፡ ወሩኬብ ።

translations.lxx: And they made on the border of the tunic below pomegranates as of a flowering pomegranate tree, of blue, and purple, and spun scarlet, and fine linen twined.
translations.kjv: And he made bars of shittim wood; five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዘባኑ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሂጶዲጤን ፡ መትሕቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ጽጌ ፡ ሮማን ፡ ሶበ ፡ ትጸጊ ፡ በደረከኖ ፡
                  ወበሕብረ ፡ ከብድ ፡ ወበለይ ፡ ፍቱል ፡ ወበሜላት ፡ ክዑብ ።

translations.lxx: And they made golden bells, and put the bells on the border of the tunic round about between the pomegranates:
translations.kjv: And five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the tabernacle for the sides westward.

verses.geez:
ወገብሩ ፡ ጸናጽለ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ወወደይዎ ፡ ለጸናጽሉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጽነፊሁ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሂጶዲጤን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐውዱ ፡
                  ማእከለ ፡ ዝክቱ ፡ ፍሬ ፡ ሮማን ፤

translations.lxx: a golden bell and a pomegranate on the border of the tunic round about, for the ministration, as the Lord commanded Moses.
translations.kjv: And he made the middle bar to shoot through the boards from the one end to the other.

verses.geez:
ጸነጽለተ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ዐውዱ ፡ ወፍሬ ፡ ሮማን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጽንፉ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሂጶዲጤን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐውዱ ፡ በዘቦ ፡
                  ይገብሩ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And they made vestments of fine linen, a woven work, for Aaron and his sons,
translations.kjv: And he overlaid the boards with gold, and made their rings of gold to be places for the bars, and overlaid the bars with gold.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ አልባሰ ፡ ዐፅፍ ፡ ዘሜላት ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፤

translations.lxx: and the tires of fine linen, and the mitre of fine linen, and the drawers of fine linen twined;
translations.kjv: And he made a vail of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen: with cherubims made he it of cunning work.

verses.geez: ወልብሰ ፡ ቂዳርስ ፡ ዘሜላት ፡ ወልብሰ ፡ ሚጥራ ፡ ዘሜላት ፡ ወልብሰ ፡ ቃስ ፡ ዘሜላት ፡ ክዑብ ፤

translations.lxx: and their girdles of fine linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet spun, the work of an embroiderer, according as the Lord commanded Moses.
translations.kjv: And he made thereunto four pillars of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold: their hooks were of gold; and he cast for them four sockets of silver.

verses.geez:
ወቅናታቲሆሙ ፡ ዘሜላት ፡ ወዘደረከኖ ፡ ወዘሕብረ ፡ ከብድ ፡ ወዘለይ ፡ ፍቱል ፡ ወዕሡቅ ፡ ግብሩ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: And they made the golden plate, a dedicated thing of the sanctuary, of pure gold; and he wrote upon it graven letters as of a seal, Holiness to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And he made an hanging for the tabernacle door of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, of needlework;

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ ቈጽለ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ፍሉጥ ፡ ለመቅደስ ፡ እምወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ።

translations.lxx: And they put it on the border of blue, so that it should be on the mitre above, as the Lord commanded Moses.
translations.kjv: And the five pillars of it with their hooks: and he overlaid their chapiters and their fillets with gold: but their five sockets were of brass.

verses.geez: ወገብሩ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ መጽሐፈ ፡ ወመሰልዎ ፡ በማኅተ[ም] ፡ ቅድሳቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።
ወወደዩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ነፅፈ ፡ ዘደረከኖ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይንበር ፡ መልዕልቶ ፡ ለልብሰ ፡ ሚጥራ ።
